title: Minechants!
description: Configurable utility enchants: Magnetic, Smelting, 3x3 Miner, Explosive. Keybind toggles + in-game config. Fabric 1.21.x
body:
This mod adds 4 new pickaxe enchants to help with your mining! These include:

3^3 Miner - Your pickaxe will now mine a cube in front of you

Smelting - Anything smeltable that you mine will automatically smelt when mined!

Explosive - With 3 levels, it creates a small harmless explosion, clearing out larger amounts of space the higher the level!

Magnetic - Automatically brings in blocks/ores you have mined to you! NEW

All of these are toggleable in the config, and can also be toggled on/off in-game using configurable keybinds!

To submit suggestions, put them on my Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/user/Both_Cardiologist118/comments/1s788d1/all_suggestions_from_yt
